compiled_state.title: Migrate validate-work staging tests and prompts to @playwright/cli
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Migrate three files from MCP tools to @playwright/cli:
1. validate-work/SKILL.md — Sub-agent 5 browser references
2. validate-work/prompts/staging-environment-test.md — staging test prompt
3. debug-everything/prompts/playwright-verification.md — verification prompt

For each file: replace browser_* MCP tool references with CLI Bash equivalents, add pre-flight check, add output validation, add session naming with worktree ID.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/prompts/staging-environment-test.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/playwright-verification.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No browser_* MCP tool references in validate-work Sub-agent 5
  Verify: ! grep -q "browser_" plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/prompts/staging-environment-test.md
- [ ] CLI commands present in staging prompt
  Verify: grep -q "@playwright/cli\|playwright.*cli" plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/prompts/staging-environment-test.md
- [ ] playwright-verification.md uses CLI
  Verify: grep -q "@playwright/cli\|playwright.*cli" plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/playwright-verification.md
- [ ] All RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-validate-work-cli-migration.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "FAIL" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
